Specializing in

Custom-Built Visual Solutions

Contact Us

Welcome to the
ASF Era

Art Support Factory is a creative fabrication studio specializing in film environments, exhibition structures, POS solutions and custom-built visual installations.

By combining 3D design, engineering expertise and advanced manufacturing technologies, we transform complex creative concepts into fully realized physical experiences:, from large-scale movie sets and branded environments to unique decorative elements.

25+

years of work experience

150+

successful projects

45+

satisfied clients over the years

6

countries in the CEE region

Our Works

Technology

Advanced fabrication technologies for custom-built visual experiences, installations and industrial production.

Large format 3d printing

Industrial-scale additive manufacturing for oversized custom structures and props.

  • Up to 1800 x 1500 x 1500 mm build
  • Lightweight constructions
  • Complex custom geometries
  • Rapid prototyping & production

CNC & Machining

Precision cutting and milling for wood, plastics and composite materials.

  • Up to 2000 x 3000 mm work area
  • CNC routing & engraving
  • Precision fabrication
  • Custom structural components

Plastic Forming

Thermoforming and plastic shaping for custom installations and parts.

  • Vacuum forming up to 680 x 480 mm
  • Acrylic & PET-G bending
  • Heat forming technologies
  • Custom mold production

Digital Printing

High-resolution printing for rigid and flexible surfaces.

  • Up to 3040 mm print width
  • UV flatbed & roll-to-roll printing
  • Indoor & outdoor graphics
  • High-detail color reproduction

Lighting & Electronics

Integrated lighting systems and motion-controlled installations.

  • 5V / 12V / 24V systems
  • Programmable LED integration
  • Motors & movement control
  • Interactive electronic solutions

Finishing & Assembly

Complete post-processing and installation-ready production.

  • Painting & surface coating
  • Assembly & integration
  • Testing & quality control
  • On-site installation support

Contact

If you have any questions or would like to bring your project to life with us, feel free to contact us through one of the channels below.
